explicit_text: The Pentagon was the site of a terrorist attack on September 11, 2001, which we responded to immediately as United States Park Police helicopter pilots. We saw the black smoke plume from the northern part of Reagan National Airport and launched Eagle Two with a mass casualty kit to assist. We landed on the west side of the Pentagon, at the northwest cloverleaf near Route 29 and Army Navy Drive, to deploy medical personnel and secure the landing zone. The scene was chaotic with many injured, mostly burn patients, and our role was critical in the initial medical evacuation efforts.
